---
title: "norn.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\wardens\norn.py"
loc: 49
complexity: 9
logic_score: 6.13
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 4.86
---

## Intent
The `norn.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on NornWarden, __init__, scan, _parse_task_line, get_next_target, mark_complete. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via NornWarden, __init__, scan, _parse_task_line, get_next_target, mark_complete. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)

### Exports
- `NornWarden`
- `__init__`
- `scan`
- `_parse_task_line`
- `get_next_target`
- `mark_complete`
